title: UTILITY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: CITY OF FOREST GROVE UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides electric and water bill payment assistance when funding is available. 1924 Council Street Forest Grove, OR 971160326 Eligibility: Low income households who are current customer of the City of Forest Grove Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-4pm Email (503) 992-3221 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 992-3200 Main phone Main phone (503) 992-3221 Utility bill and payment assistance Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in to apply or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: City of Forest Grove Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF FOREST GROVE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
